summary: Admin Security Features testing completed. All 16 backend API tests pass. Frontend Security Dashboard UI fully functional with 4 tabs (Overview, Emergency Lockdown, IP Whitelist, Audit Logs). Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in lockdown-status endpoint and IP whitelist endpoint parameter handling.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed MongoDB _id serialization in get_lockdown_status() - added {'_id': 0} projection
Fixed IP whitelist endpoint to accept List[str] as Query parameter instead of body
Added Query import from fastapi for proper parameter handling
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Line 5168: Changed whitelist parameter to Query(default=[])
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing admin user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Security features fully implemented and tested. Security Dashboard at /admin/security with 4 tabs. Backend APIs: GET /api/admin/security/dashboard, GET/POST /api/admin/security/ip-whitelist, GET /api/admin/security/audit-logs, GET /api/admin/security/lockdown-status, POST /api/admin/security/lockdown, POST /api/admin/security/lockdown/deactivate. All working correctly.

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: MongoDB ObjectId serialization error in lockdown-status endpoint
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added {'_id': 0} projection to find_one query in get_lockdown_status()

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: IP whitelist update endpoint expecting body instead of query params
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Changed whitelist parameter to use Query(default=[]) for proper query param handling
